title: LDFDRT 7 inch Sage Green Party Paper Plates for Dinner Cake Dessert 50 pcs Paper Tableware Plates Party Supplies for Birthday Holiday Wedding Baby Shower Decorations
features: 50 pcs BIRTHDAY PLATES SET: Elevate your celebration with this bulk pack of 50 x 7-inch sage green birthday paper plates! Perfectly sized for cakes, desserts, or appetizers, these plates feature vibrant designs, festive patterns. Ideal for large gatherings, this set offers unbeatable value for birthdays, anniversaries, or milestone events parties.

DURABLE ECO-FRIENDLY MATERIALS: Crafted from heavyweight paper, sage green birthday party plates resist bending, tearing, or soggy messes. BPA-free, biodegradable, they’re safe for food contact and gentle on the environment. Note: Not microwave-safe.
STYLISH DESIGN：The classic design of paper plates can be applied to many birthdays, parties.These colorful design elements can make your party more elegant and stylish while dining.

STRESS-FREE CLEANUP: Disposable and lightweight, these plates save you post-party hassle—simply toss after use! Spend less time washing dishes and more time enjoying moments with guests, whether it’s a family dinner, coworker gathering, or grand 50th birthday bash.

PERFECT FOR EVERY CELEBRATION: Designed for all ages and occasions—parties, milestone birthdays (50th, 60th, 70th), women’s luncheons, or casual get-togethers. Mix and match with themed napkins or use standalone for a pop of color. A must-have for party planners seeking style and practicality!
